title: Review: Fetch API
summary: W03 Learning Activity: Review: The Fetch API A key in modern web development is making asynchronous HTTP requests to communicate with servers without forcing a full page refresh. This activity will help you review how to use the Fetch API to make these requests. The Fetch API [The Fetch API: https://byui-cse.github.io/wdd231-ww-course/week02/prepare-...
